name: surgical-team
displayName: Surgical Team — Elite Engineering AI Skills
description: 7 specialized AI Doctors (Backend, DevOps, QA, Frontend, Security, Data, Orchestrator) with 225 rules, 39 pipeline stages, and 133 quality checks across 6 engineering domains.
author: Jeffrey Pareja

dr-orchestrator.description: Chief of Surgery — triages requests and dispatches the right specialist doctor

dr-backend.description: Elite System Architect — API, database, auth, caching, resilience

dr-devops.description: Elite Platform Architect — IaC, Kubernetes, CI/CD, observability, DR

dr-qa.description: Elite Quality Gatekeeper — E2E, API contract, performance, a11y, security testing

dr-frontend.description: Elite Experience Architect — components, design tokens, a11y, Core Web Vitals, state

dr-security.description: Elite Threat Defender — AppSec, cloud security, IAM, compliance, IR

dr-data.description: Elite Pipeline Architect — dbt, Airflow, data quality, warehousing, governance
